subcodes.first_line: O verdant and flourishing branch of the blessed Tree! Not long ago, through spiritual fragrances and the attractions of hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع النضر الخضل من الشجره المبارکه چندی پیش بنفحات روح و جذبات قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
